intel.title: [CISA KEV] Google Chromium V8 - Google Chromium V8 Out-of-Bounds Read and Write Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-11645
廠商: Google
產品: Chromium V8
漏洞名稱: Google Chromium V8 Out-of-Bounds Read and Write Vulnerability
說明: Google Chromium V8 out-of-bounds read and write vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-23
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Google Chromium V8 引擎存在越界讀寫漏洞（CVE-2026-11645），遠端攻擊者可透過誘導使用者訪問惡意網頁，在沙箱內執行任意程式碼。此漏洞已被收錄於 CISA KEV 漏洞名單中，證實已有在野利用，將直接威脅公司員工日常使用的 Chrome、Edge 等瀏覽器安全。
analysis.recommendation:
1. 針對「資訊設備-桌上型電腦/筆記型電腦」與「資訊設備-行動裝置」，全面檢查並更新 Google Chrome、Microsoft Edge 等基於 Chromium 核心的瀏覽器至最新安全版本。
2. 建議透過端點管理工具或 AD 群組原則強制啟用瀏覽器自動更新機制。
3. 宣導員工避免點擊來源不明的網頁連結，以降低受駭風險。
affected_assets: 資訊設備-桌上型電腦/筆記型電腦

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Arista Extensible Operating System - Arista Extensible Operating System Incomplete Comparison with Missing Factors Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-7473
廠商: Arista
產品: Extensible Operating System
漏洞名稱: Arista Extensible Operating System Incomplete Comparison with Missing Factors Vulnerability
說明: Arista Extensible Operating System (EOS) contains an incomplete comparison with missing factors vulnerability when the switch incorrectly decapsulate and forwards other unexpected tunneled packet with a destination IP matching its configured decapsulation IP.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-23
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Arista Extensible Operating System (EOS) 存在安全漏洞 (CVE-2026-7473)，當交換器處理特定隧道封包時，可能錯誤地進行解封裝與轉發。此漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知利用漏洞清單，可能導致網路流量異常或安全邊界失效。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager - Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-20245
廠商: Cisco
產品: Catalyst SD-WAN Manager
漏洞名稱: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability
說明: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root by supplying a crafted file to the affected system.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-23
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager 存在編碼與轉義不當漏洞（CVE-2026-20245），已被收錄於 CISA KEV 漏洞名單。本地具備權限的攻擊者可透過上傳特製檔案，以 root 權限執行任意指令。由於此漏洞已被實際利用，若企業內部部署該產品，將面臨極高的本地提權與系統控制風險。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
